title: SubstationReading
description: Schema for Eventstream messages from power grid substation telemetry. Used for column mapping configuration in Microsoft Fabric Eventstream.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp with CET/CEST timezone (Europe/Warsaw). Example: 2025-01-15T14:30:00+01:00

substation_name.description: Human-readable name of the substation. Example: 'Warszawa Mory'.

latitude.description: Latitude of the substation in decimal degrees (WGS84).

longitude.description: Longitude of the substation in decimal degrees (WGS84).

voltage_kv.description: Measured voltage at main busbar in kilovolts. Nominal: 220 kV, range ±15 kV under normal conditions.

frequency_hz.description: Grid frequency in hertz. Nominal: 50.000 Hz. Normal range: 49.8–50.2 Hz.

power_factor.description: Power factor (cos φ). Target: >0.95. Warning below 0.90.

load_pct.description: Transformer load as percentage of rated capacity. Warning >85%, Critical >90%.

transformer_temp_c.description: Transformer oil/winding temperature in degrees Celsius. Warning >75°C, Critical >85°C.

ambient_temp_c.description: Ambient (outdoor) temperature at the substation in degrees Celsius.

status.description: Operational status determined by monitoring logic. Normal: all parameters in range. Warning: one or more parameters near threshold. Critical: immediate attention required.
